speaker: rep
text: Hey Mark, thanks for taking my call. We spoke two weeks ago about your team's outbound challenges and I wanted to follow up.

speaker: prospect
text: Right, I remember. We discussed the AI personalization features. I shared the info with my team.

speaker: rep
text: Great to hear. So, um, like, what did they think about it?

speaker: prospect
text: Generally positive. The SDR manager was especially interested in the multi-channel sequencing.

speaker: rep
text: That's awesome. Yeah, the multi-channel piece is really popular. Basically it lets you coordinate email, LinkedIn, and phone touches in a single sequence.

speaker: prospect
text: Right. One concern that came up was around data privacy. We're in healthcare, so HIPAA compliance is non-negotiable.

speaker: rep
text: Totally understand. We're SOC 2 Type II certified and we offer a HIPAA-compliant deployment option. We can sign a BAA as part of the contract.

speaker: prospect
text: Good, that's important. What about the onboarding timeline? Our team wants to be up and running before Q3.

speaker: rep
text: So, you know, the onboarding is, like, sort of flexible. I think maybe we could, um, probably get you set up in about 3 weeks.

speaker: prospect
text: Three weeks would be tight but doable. We'd need to start by end of this month.

speaker: rep
text: That should be feasible. Our onboarding team handles the CRM integration, imports your existing sequences, and trains your reps on the platform.

speaker: prospect
text: Sounds good. I'm pretty much sold on this. The team likes it.

speaker: rep
text: That's great to hear, Mark. I'm glad the team is on board.

speaker: prospect
text: Yeah, definitely. We've been dealing with these outbound issues for months now.

speaker: rep
text: I can imagine. A lot of teams in healthcare face similar challenges with personalization at scale.

speaker: prospect
text: Exactly. So what would we need to do to move forward?

speaker: rep
text: Well, um, there are a few things. Like, we'd need to, you know, get some paperwork together and sort of align on the details.

speaker: prospect
text: Sure, but can you be specific? Who do I need to involve and what's the process?

speaker: rep
text: Right, sorry. I'll send over the order form and the BAA today. You'll need sign-off from your legal team on the BAA and procurement approval on the order form.

speaker: prospect
text: Perfect. Send those over and I'll get the ball rolling on our end.

speaker: rep
text: Will do. I'll have everything in your inbox by end of day. Thanks for the update, Mark.

speaker: prospect
text: Thanks. Talk soon.
